name: daily monitor emits a per-source status line so operators can observe which sources fetched and which failed
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus fixtures && printf '{"gate":"pass"}\n' > pr-corpus/quality-eval.json && printf 'sources: [{id: a, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]},{id: b, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]\n' > fixtures/sources.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/monitor.sh" --gate-result pr-corpus/quality-eval.json --once --sources fixtures/sources.yaml --fetcher-stub pass 2>out.txt && grep -q 'source=a status=' out.txt && grep -q 'source=b status=' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
